title: eragrostis cilianensis subsp. starosselskyi
intro: Eragrostis cilianensis subsp. starosselskyi, also known as the Starosselsky wheatgrass, is a subspecies of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Eragrostis cilianensis subsp. starosselskyi include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and its extracts have been studied for their potential as natural remedies for various health conditions.
